title: Re-Introducing #amytangerine Featured Fangerines!
excerpt: Welcome to my newly renamed #amytangerine Featured Fangerines series! I love seeing photos of all of your projects using my products, so I wanted to go back to regularly featuring some of my favorites here on my blog. You can…
body:
Welcome to my newly renamed #amytangerine Featured Fangerines series! I love seeing photos of all of your projects using my products, so I wanted to go back to regularly featuring some of my favorites here on my blog.

You can buy my latest collection, On a Whim, at Scrapbook.com and Simon Says Stamp. And if you use anything I’ve designed, definitely tag it with #amytangerine so I can see what you made! 

What is your favorite product from my On a Whim collection?
